levels.description: When an attack hits an opponent, deal AoE DMG equal to 40% of Max HP at the target location. This effect can be triggered once every 15s.
When an attack hits an opponent, deal AoE DMG equal to 50% of Max HP at the target's location. This effect can be triggered once every 15s.
When an attack hits an opponent, deal AoE DMG equal to 60% of Max HP at the target's location. This effect can be triggered once every 15s.
When an attack hits an opponent, deal AoE DMG equal to 70% of Max HP at the target's location. This effect can be triggered once every 15s.
When an attack hits an opponent, deal AoE DMG equal to 80% of Max HP at the target's location. This effect can be triggered once every 15s.
